description:
Offered: every fourth semester
This basic course in script writing for film, television and multi-image productions includes information on the preparation of proposals, treatments, storyboards and scripts. Script formats include documentary, educational, corporate and dramatic film/video writing. Cross-listed with COMM 2320
Prerequisite(s): ENGL 1200 or HON 1200
Note: Credit is not given for both ENGL 2320 and COMM 2320 .
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA
